next_action: Use sandbox-to-live promotion paths before adding the capability debt report and before enabling any live-action surface.

stages.description: Capability is registered and bounded for isolated proof.
stages.label: Sandbox

stages.description: Capability has local demo or mock-evaluation evidence.
stages.label: Local demo

stages.description: Capability has no-effect rehearsal, receipt, and replay obligations.
stages.label: Dry-run

stages.description: Capability needs approval, evidence review, or recovery review.
stages.label: Operator review

stages.description: Capability is eligible only for bounded pilot planning after live evidence.
stages.label: Pilot

stages.description: Capability requires bounded live receipts and active rollback coverage.
stages.label: Limited live

stages.description: Capability requires approved live action evidence and terminal receipts.
stages.label: Approved live

stages.description: Capability requires production witness evidence and retained monitoring.
stages.label: Production
